health_conditions: chronic pain from foot and knee surgery

benefits.description: Less chronic pain to enable more consistent movement
Improved recovery and overall quality of life

side_effects.description: User monitoring for nausea as a potential side effect to titrate back on if experienced

protocol_notes: Starting conservatively with slow titration. Stack decision based on community feedback recommending against stacking Tesamorelin with Retatrutide due to redundancy. GLOW selected as blend product (likely containing BPC-157 and TB-500 based on context of comments discussing separate compounds). User is working with a doctor and handling diet and movement as foundations.
